email_body:
Dear SELECT HR team,

I am writing to apply for the Warehouse Officer position in Beveren-Kruibeke-Zwijndrecht, as advertised via VDAB. With hands-on experience in warehouse operations at Katoen Natie and strong administrative and coordination skills, I am confident I can contribute effectively to your team.

In my previous role at Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment, which aligns with your need for precise reception and transit coordination. I am proficient in MS Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, SharePoint, Teams) and have excellent English skills, with basic Dutch (A2, currently studying). I am detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable with stock control, reporting, and internal communication.

I am available to start as soon as possible and can work full-time day shifts. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my background can support your warehouse operations.

Thank you for your consideration.

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear SELECT HR team,

I am excited to apply for the Warehouse Officer position at SELECT HR, based in Beveren-Kruibeke-Zwijndrecht. With a solid foundation in warehouse logistics from my time at Katoen Natie and strong administrative and coordination skills, I am well-prepared to take on the responsibilities of this role.

At Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment where accuracy and efficiency were paramount. This experience directly translates to managing the reception and transit processes, coordinating put-away, and ensuring correct registration of goods. I am comfortable with stock control, reporting discrepancies, and maintaining order and cleanliness in the warehouse.

I am proficient in MS Office applications (Outlook, Word, Excel, SharePoint, Teams) and have excellent English skills (professional level), with basic Dutch (A2, currently taking classes). I am detail-oriented, organized, and able to communicate effectively with internal teams and transport departments. I am also experienced in handling shared mailboxes and responding to inquiries.

I am available to start immediately and can work full-time day shifts (7:30-16:00). I am eager to contribute to your team and grow within an international environment. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your needs.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025-2026) in a high-volume, fast-paced environment
Proficient in MS Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, SharePoint, Teams)
Excellent English (professional) and basic Dutch (A2, in progress)
Detail-oriented with strong accuracy and organizational skills
Available immediately for full-time day shifts (7:30-16:00)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, and hands-on warehouse experience at Katoen Natie. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, content, and WordPress sites. My warehouse background has honed my accuracy, efficiency, and ability to coordinate in a fast-paced logistics environment. I am proficient in MS Office, have excellent English, and basic Dutch (A2, in progress). Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp, I am available for full-time day shifts.

Core Skills
- Warehouse & Logistics: accuracy, efficiency, high-volume environment, coordination
- MS Office: Outlook, Word, Excel, SharePoint, Teams
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Administrative: stock control, reporting, communication, shared mailbox management
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

Experience

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

Projects

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References
Available on request.
